title: rubus imbellis
intro: Rubus imbellis, also known as the Dwarf Raspberry or Small Raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus imbellis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of certain types of cancer and digestive issues. Rubus imbellis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, and its leaves and roots can be used fresh or dried for various applications.
